pages.text:
§a§lBEASTKEEPER'S
    ANECDOTE§r

§7§oStories and secrets
from one who learned
to speak with the
creatures of this
world...§r

§8— The Old Shepherd

§a§lThe Bound Spirits§r

§7§oThey are everywhere,
child. Spirits of
beast and legend,
waiting in hidden
places to bond with
those who find them.

Some common as cats.
Others rare as
dragonfire.§r

§a§lWhere They Dwell§r

§7§oSpirits slumber in
treasure. The same
crates that yield
gold and gems may
also yield a loyal
companion.

The richer the
treasure, the rarer
the spirit within.§r

§a§lThe Growing Bond§r

§7§oA spirit grows
stronger the longer
it stays with you.
Patience rewards
the keeper.

In time, they share
more of their
essence... and your
dreams grow with
theirs.§r

§a§lLegendary Spirits§r

§7§oI have heard tales
of spirits beyond
imagining. Dragons
of gold. Walkers of
the void. Weavers
of time itself.

They exist. But only
those who dream
boldly find them.§r

§a§lThe Keeper's Trade§r

§7§oSome folk have made
a profession of it —
the Zookeepers, they
call themselves.

They trade in spirits
and shards. Seek
them if you wish
to expand your
menagerie.§r

§a§lA Final Thought§r

§7§oThe spirits choose
us as much as we
choose them.

Be worthy of their
company. Treat them
well. And they will
walk beside you
through any darkness.

§8Be kind, keeper.§r
